creator: fenner@parc.xerox.com
text:
Could you build with debugging and send in a traceback?  (Replying to
this message will insert it into the audit trail of this bug report).
"memsize" doesn't segfault for me.

Thanks,
  Bill

P.S. You're not using malloc flag A, right?  memsize depends on malloc
failing, so malloc flag A will just interfere with memsize's operation.
